text: Adobe Inc. operates as a diversified software company worldwide through three primary segments: Digital Media, Digital Experience, and Publishing and Advertising [C002]. The Digital Media segment serves as the company's flagship, offering Creative Cloud subscription services that enable individuals, teams, and enterprises to create, publish, and promote content, alongside Document Cloud, a unified cloud-based document services platform [C002]. The Digital Experience segment provides an integrated platform enabling brands and businesses to create, manage, execute, measure, monetize, and optimize customer experiences from analytics to commerce [C002]. The Publishing and Advertising segment offers e-learning solutions, technical document publishing, web conferencing, document and forms platform, web application development, high-end printing, and Advertising Cloud offerings [C002]. Adobe distributes products directly to enterprise customers through its sales force and local field offices, as well as to end users through app stores and adobe.com, supplemented by a network of distributors, value-added resellers, systems integrators, and OEMs [C002]. The company employs 30,709 full-time employees and is headquartered in San Jose, California [C001].
